title: found_any_name sentinel in eval_exists_test is correct RFC 5228 edge case handling
description: eval_exists_test (evaluator.rs:621-647) uses found_any_name to return false when no header names are listed, rather than vacuously returning true. A reviewer might suggest removing it ('just return true for empty list'). That would violate RFC 5228 §5.7 semantics and break the test_exists_empty_list_is_false integration test. The sentinel is the correct and minimal fix. The logic is well-commented and covered by a specific test.
